final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign with a complex but well-organized visual composition.

Style/medium: needs a bold, editorial promotional-poster aesthetic with artistic typography and layered type stacking — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include type-stacking layers with a foreground product/subject physically overlapping and partially obscuring background text layers
Subject: must include a prominent product or hero subject in the foreground that occludes portions of the typographic layers behind it
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a visually rich, attention-grabbing direction — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include artistic display lettering (艺术字); must include stacked / layered typography (字体堆叠); composition must feel complex and dense yet visually ordered — not chaotic; foreground subject must visibly overlap at least some text elements
Avoid: flat or sparse layouts; cluttered illegible chaos
